sections.title: Final status semantics — degraded when any source degraded
sections.detail: _compute_final_status() checks all source statuses. Feed not_connected → degraded overall. Live run verified status=degraded.

sections.title: Final report order — pre-computed paths, correct sequence
sections.detail: Order: finished_at → output/state paths in result → source health → artifacts → run history update. Final report written last. Output paths include state DB paths.

sections.title: Whale required field validation — no zero defaults
sections.detail: WhalePositionInput not constructed when signed_size/entry_price/mark_price/position_value_usd/leverage are None or invalid. Field validation errors recorded with kind=required_field_error. Mark price still injectable via allMids.

sections.title: Mapping status — explicit kind field, correct status/ok
sections.detail: Errors use explicit kind field (parse_error, mapping_error, required_field_error). errors=0 → ok=true. errors>0 with partial valid → degraded, ok=false. Completely unavailable → unavailable, ok=false. Previous state only overwritten on zero errors.

sections.title: Workbench atomic output — no open() fallback
sections.detail: render_workbench(bundle, output_path) is the only write path. No open(html_path, 'w') fallback.

sections.title: Runtime file cleanup
sections.detail: data/integration/.gitignore created (output/, state/, *.db, *.lock, *.json, *.html). All tracked runtime files removed from git index. Live run used temp dirs, cleaned after evidence capture.

sections.title: Evidence binding
sections.detail: R04 evidence with full structured summary. R03 marked superseded.

sections.title: Operations verification — real get_run() queries
sections.detail: Fresh live run verified: run_history row exists with status=degraded, source_health has 6 rows.

sections.title: Fresh-state live acceptance
sections.detail: Temp dirs, no prior state. Whale baseline=true, 1 position, 1 change (baseline_open_position), 2 alerts. BTC/ETH/SOL/HYPE all live success. Feed degraded. Overall status=degraded. 0 errors.

sections.title: Complete tests
sections.detail: 287 passed / 1 skipped (combined pytest), 86 adapter PASS, 44 feed/UI PASS. 0 failed.

live_run_summary.degraded_reason: Feed not_connected (readers not wired — expected external limitation)

known_limitations: Feed readers not wired — live-public feed handler returns not_connected (expected, documented limitation)
ccxt/hyperliquid namespace shadow: pre-import + sys.modules restore in one_shot.py works around hyperliquid.ccxt shadowing the real ccxt module
No cross-host state sharing — whale snapshot state is local to state_dir
